sector_summary: The top sectors include Technology, Financials, Healthcare, and Materials, all with medium confidence levels based on positive news flow. Sectors to avoid include Energy, Consumer Staples, and Industrials, with the latter two showing low confidence due to lack of supporting news. Notably, Consumer Discretionary and Clean Energy sectors exhibit conflicts between price momentum and news flow, indicating uncertainty in those areas.
